item.title: Seattle Used to Be Lower
item.description:
When Seattle was first built, it was at sea level, which fucked with the sewage system
The original pipes were also, to be polite, substandard.
After a great fire damaged much of the city in June of 1889, the city took advantage of the rebuilding process and rebuilt much of the infrastructure physically higher, leaving the first floors well below street level.
The new sidewalks occasionally featured glass block "skylights" for the folks still using the original first floors that now functioned as Basements.
You can still see remnants of this 130 year old hidden city
There's even an official tour
It's not huge, but it's neat to see some fragments of what used to be there
It's in Pioneer Square, if you're ever in Seattle it's cool to see.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 35
item.description:
I FUCKING LOVE CHEESE!
So incredibly accurate
I’m constantly scanning for threats and it’s exhausting
I really fucking love cheese!
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: REPORT: White House staffer Sergio Gor accused of being Russian. Mr. Apartheid appears to resume his attack on the Orange regime.
item.description: Source of story: https://www.thedailybeast.com/elon-musk-accuses-trump-aide-sergio-gor-of-federal-crime-as-feud-explodes/ Distraction or not, this is a mildly interesting event to me. MAGA appears to be suffering some fractures between Israeli and Russian interests, especially as the Israel/Iran conflict picks up momentum.

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Jamila - Side Effect YouTube: https://youtu.be/LFvYYBFP-Zs?si=TTGtbK13KV-5oIeB Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/4k3YwOjjGSMbIJSDD7PYXQ?si=ca381b2ccccb4b44

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: Idaho never fails to disappoint...
item.description: Homophobes had to have their own pride fest... Didn't turn out too well... As an Idahoan, I'm disappointed, but not surprised. Disappointed that we'd even have an event like this, let me be clear. Description from Latter Gay Stories page: BOISE, Idaho — A two-day festival intended to counter Pride Month celebrations in Boise, Idaho, fell flat on June 20-21, 2025, as the “Hetero Awesome Fest” drew sparse crowds to Cecil D. Andrus Park, across from the Idaho state Capitol. Organized by Mark Fitzpatrick, owner of the Old State Saloon in Eagle, the event aimed to promote “traditional family values” with live music, food vendors, and speakers. Fitzpatrick, who launched “Heterosexual Awesomeness Month” last year, described the festival as a celebration of “faith, family, and freedom.” However, the event faced immediate backlash for its timing during Pride Month and its perceived anti-LGBTQ+ stance, fueled by the saloon’s Instagram posts criticizing the “wicked” LGBTQ+ agenda and promoting conspiracy theories. Local media, including Idaho News 6, reported that turnout was negligible, with one observer noting the festival “probably could have been an email.” Social media reactions highlighted the event’s poor naming and execution, with one commenter stating, “Look at how much of a waste of time and money hatred is.” The festival struggled to secure sponsorships, raising only half the needed funds despite support from United Rentals and a headline performance by Michael Austin. Reports suggest the event was attended by fewer than 100 people. In contrast, Boise’s LGBTQ+ community responded with a satirical counter-event at The Balcony Club titled “But, What About Straight Pride?” Held on June 20, the show drew significant attendance and support, underscoring the city’s embrace of inclusivity. The flop of Fitzpatrick’s Hetero Fest, juxtaposed with the success of the counter-event, reinforced Boise’s shifting cultural landscape, where messages of acceptance resonated more strongly than division. Queer people are part of our communities and they always will be. Supporters of the Festival have now turned to social media asking for money to cover expenses including security costs—exceeding $18,000, money they expected to raise from the attendees that never showed up.
item.dc:creator: ewakemanVA

item.title: Sunday MEME Phone Clearing Dump (To take your mind of WW3)
item.description:
1. It do be like that
2. Me who just wanted some cake
3. Still one of the best pre-fight exchanges
4. Mugshots used to be way more descriptive...
5. Civil War II when?
6. Women be like
7. You're god damn right, lady
8. *sigh* "We're not so different, you and I
9. JUST SHUT UP, BRO
10. Escape attempt foiled again!
11
12. Shotgun yer beer they said....
13. Awwww, so romantic
14. HOLD UP BUDDY, You've been scrolling for too long so I gotta slap you with a puppy tax "Give up, Barkanin! I have the higher ground!"
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a realistic bodycam-style psychological horror game, based on one of the most disturbing real life experiments in history. You are tested by a mysterious figure. Trough your choices the game explores themes of obedience to authority, cruelty and necessary moral dilemmas Please wishlist if it is something that interests you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: If someone labels themself an alpha, I automatically deduct 20 points off their IQ
item.description: You shouldn't be able to self-gloss yourself an alpha anyway. That should be left for "the pack" to decide, no? Anyway, I'm with Frogger Neal. Stop calling yourself an alpha. The only acceptable alpha males right now, if there are any, are Barack Obama and Pedro Pascal... you turds...

item.title: What Happened Today #142
item.description: STOP! We're living through the textbook definition of fascism and calling it Tuesday. Children fighting adults for clean water in detention camps while federal agents shoot journalists with rubber bullets who are covering immigration raids. Trump spent days talking about bombing Iran then ordered the attack without the congressional authorization the Constitution demands. A federal judge handed an academic award to a Nazi law student who argued that the Constitution applies only to white people. Texas mandated Christian displays in schools less than 24 hours after Louisiana's identical law was blocked. This is what we studied in history class, but we're still pretending it's "political differences" instead of constitutional collapse. Stop waiting for someone else to say the words. Call your representatives and tell them you see exactly what this is. Demand they name it and fight it like the emergency it actually is. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today or visit us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/us-attacks-iran 2. https://go.govbrief.today/mn-lobbyist-threatens-lawmakers 3. https://go.govbrief.today/nih-hiv-guidelines 4. https://go.govbrief.today/genetic-researchers-forced-out 5. https://go.govbrief.today/delaware-gender-affirming-care 6. https://go.govbrief.today/detention-center-no-water 7. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-10-commandments 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ufla-white-supremacy-paper 9. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-rules-spare-food-cuts 10. https://go.govbrief.today/usps-evs-sold Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/rose-garden-bulldozed Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/la-journalists-sue-noem Free, Private Email - https://govbrief.today (we don't even ask your name!)

item.title: It's meme dump day ... Again... Vol 140
item.description:
Well hello friends. New day, new horrors. If things get real out of control, it's been nice knowing you all. Here are some memes!
I stopped taking one of my medicines (muscle relaxer) per the new doctor and now I'm not sleeping again
.
Not soon enough lol
My kid in kindergarten hahaha. I forgot to tell him about it and he was like yeah they do this weird thing at school and I'm not doing it.
Meow
I always want it but I rarely give in.
I need a moss garden.
I went to a creek in the woods today and it was very regulating for my nervous system then I came home and saw the fucking bomb thing and well I think I should have stayed at the creek.
Oh
.
.
.
.
.
.
Monet
.
.
Hmm
.
It's art!
Yeah
So so dumb
If only
Here we are lol
.
.
.
.
No
.
Look at his little glasses!
Hahaha
Zzzz
Lots and lots of fury but only because of love?
.
.
My son was born end of August in Texas. Holy wow that wasn't fun lol. This HEAT DOME though. This is some shit eh?
.
.
People have been bugging me (gently and kindly) to get diagnosed again maybe I will do it this time. Hopefully RFK jr won't put me in a camp.
.
.
.
.
Sunny sparkles on the water today
Happy solstice last night
Sleepy Hobbes
Fantus in the rainbow light.
item.dc:creator: kaeldra

item.title: Saturday Dumpy Doo comin' at you
item.description:
Awwww YISS. Mutha. Fukkin. MARS BARS
life pro tip: don't color them in, and let your kids color you with markers
That's the way you do it, get your money for nothing and your chips for free
Garlic is the new pepper (spray)
No debit cards even??
He's not wrong
I want to suck your blood, bro
hehehehe "wang"
I wonder how drugs would work on the holodeck
that cropping, tho
taco-flavored kisses
♫ Summer lovin', happened so faaaast ♫
Intriguing
IT'S A KILT!!!
I feel like I'm taking crazy pills
Heh heh heh...
I work hard so I can relax
He doesn't sugar-coat it
Purple was Reading, Blue was Biology, Green was History, Red was Math. I didn't use the yellow and orange ones.
He was going pretty ducking fast
CHUCK E. CHEESE PLEASE
oR thE eAgLeS
I'm still doing okay, relatively speaking
the dude abides
"So I told that teacher-lady, the only colors I need to learn are Red, White, and Blue."
Little feller was dog tired
It's my right as a human!
Number one in the hood, G
Just for spite
"...sorry what was that?"
Answering the REAL questions
I WANTED TO SLEEP IN TODAY, DANGIT
No one else knows what I'm talking about
They reject your reality and replace it with their own
always do my little shuffle-jog
my fellow imgurians are what got me into Doctor Who back in 2013 or so
What is it trying to say?
At least it's not raining
IT'S AN ABOMINATION
As long as you can laugh about it, right?
item.dc:creator: ddubya42

MIKE FAIST BWAAAAAHHHHH
Renee Rapp
I’m so sorry I stole your dog for this @kaeldra but in my defense LOOK AT THIS PICTURE!!!!! It’s incredible- Fantus has never looked better, you’re so talented
My boyfriend loves bears
Little Baybeez tax
Liza Jane and Froggy tax
Scruffy and Nessie tax
